languages.text: "Это была одна из сложнейших операций в моей жизни! Мы заменили большую часть головных аугментов, но лишь по разумению алого жречества в хранилищах сектора Бионика нашелся нейроимплант, способный заменить поврежденные участки мозга. Не напрасно все это время его берегли в отеке, отказывая в установке мирянам. Так ведь, Ферренц?"

"It was one of the most complex procedures I have ever performed! We replaced the majority of his head augments, but it was only thanks to the knowledge of the crimson priesthood that a neural implant capable of replacing the damaged parts of the brain was found in the repositories of the Sector Bionica. They had been keeping it in storage all this time, withholding it from the laity — and for good reason, as it turns out. Isn't that right, Ferrenz?"
languages.original_text: "Это была одна из сложнейших операций в моей жизни! Мы заменили большую часть головных аугментов, но лишь по разумению алого жречества в хранилищах сектора Бионика нашелся нейроимплант, способный заменить поврежденные участки мозга. Не напрасно все это время его берегли в отеке, отказывая в установке мирянам. Так ведь, Ферренц?"

We replaced the majority of his head augments, but it was only thanks to the knowledge of the crimson priesthood that a neural implant capable of replacing the damaged parts of the brain was found in the repositories of the Sector Bionica. They had been keeping it in storage all this time, withholding it from the laity — and for good reason, as it turns out. Isn't that right, Ferrenz?"

They had been keeping it in storage all this time, withholding it from the laity — and for good reason, as it turns out. Isn't that right, Ferrenz?"

"It was one of the most complex procedures I have ever performed! We replaced the majority of his head augments, but it was only thanks to the knowledge of the crimson priesthood that a neural implant capable of replacing the damaged parts of the brain was found in the repositories of the Sector Bionica. They had been keeping it in storage all this time, withholding it from the laity — and for good reason, as it turns out. Isn't that right, Ferrenz?"

languages.text: "Das war eine der komplexesten Prozeduren, die ich je vorgenommen habe! Wir haben den Großteil seiner Kopfaugmentationen ersetzt, aber es war allein dem Wissen der roten Priesterschaft zu verdanken, dass in den Repositorien von Sektor Bionica ein Neuralimplantat gefunden wurde, das die beschädigten Teile seines Gehirns ersetzen konnte. Sie hatten es all die Zeit aufbewahrt und vor den Laien verborgen ... und das aus gutem Grund, wie sich gezeigt hat. Ist es nicht so, Ferrenz?"
languages.original_text: "It was one of the most complex procedures I have ever performed! We replaced the majority of his head augments, but it was only thanks to the knowledge of the crimson priesthood that a neural implant capable of replacing the damaged parts of the brain was found in the repositories of the Sector Bionica. They had been keeping it in storage all this time, withholding it from the laity — and for good reason, as it turns out. Isn't that right, Ferrenz?"

traits.locale_text: "Das war eine der komplexesten Prozeduren, die ich je vorgenommen habe! Wir haben den Großteil seiner Kopfaugmentationen ersetzt, aber es war allein dem Wissen der roten Priesterschaft zu verdanken, dass in den Repositorien von Sektor Bionica ein Neuralimplantat gefunden wurde, das die beschädigten Teile seines Gehirns ersetzen konnte. Sie hatten es all die Zeit aufbewahrt und vor den Laien verborgen ... und das aus gutem Grund, wie sich gezeigt hat. Ist es nicht so, Ferrenz?"

languages.text: « Ce fut l'une des opérations les plus complexes qu'il m'ait été donné de réaliser ! Nous avons remplacé la majorité de ses augmentations crâniennes, mais il nous a fallu mobiliser le précieux savoir du clergé écarlate pour dénicher dans les réserves du secteur Bionica un implant capable de se substituer aux parties endommagées de son cerveau. Les prêtres l'ont conservé tout ce temps à l'abri des profanes, et nous avons tout lieu de rendre grâce à leur prévoyance. N'est-ce pas, Ferrenz ? »
languages.original_text: "It was one of the most complex procedures I have ever performed! We replaced the majority of his head augments, but it was only thanks to the knowledge of the crimson priesthood that a neural implant capable of replacing the damaged parts of the brain was found in the repositories of the Sector Bionica. They had been keeping it in storage all this time, withholding it from the laity — and for good reason, as it turns out. Isn't that right, Ferrenz?"

traits.locale_text: « Ce fut l'une des opérations les plus complexes qu'il m'ait été donné de réaliser ! Nous avons remplacé la majorité de ses augmentations crâniennes, mais il nous a fallu mobiliser le précieux savoir du clergé écarlate pour dénicher dans les réserves du secteur Bionica un implant capable de se substituer aux parties endommagées de son cerveau. Les prêtres l'ont conservé tout ce temps à l'abri des profanes, et nous avons tout lieu de rendre grâce à leur prévoyance. N'est-ce pas, Ferrenz ? »

languages.text: “这可以说是我执行过最复杂的手术之一！我们更换了他大部分的头部植入物。多亏了红衣神甫的学识，我们才在仿生区的仓库中找到了能替代受损脑组织的神经植入物。他们一直将其封存，从未授予凡夫俗子——如今看来确有道理。费伦茨，你说是不是？”
languages.original_text: "It was one of the most complex procedures I have ever performed! We replaced the majority of his head augments, but it was only thanks to the knowledge of the crimson priesthood that a neural implant capable of replacing the damaged parts of the brain was found in the repositories of the Sector Bionica. They had been keeping it in storage all this time, withholding it from the laity — and for good reason, as it turns out. Isn't that right, Ferrenz?"

traits.locale_text: “这可以说是我执行过最复杂的手术之一！我们更换了他大部分的头部植入物。多亏了红衣神甫的学识，我们才在仿生区的仓库中找到了能替代受损脑组织的神经植入物。他们一直将其封存，从未授予凡夫俗子——如今看来确有道理。费伦茨，你说是不是？”

languages.text: «¡Fue uno de los procedimientos más complejos que jamás he realizado! Sustituimos la mayor parte de los aumentos de su cabeza, pero solo pudimos encontrar un implante neural capaz de sustituir las partes dañadas del cerebro gracias al saber del sacerdocio de Marte. Lo habían guardado, evitando dárselo a los laicos... y, por lo que se ve, con razones de sobra, ¿verdad, Ferrenz?».
languages.original_text: "It was one of the most complex procedures I have ever performed! We replaced the majority of his head augments, but it was only thanks to the knowledge of the crimson priesthood that a neural implant capable of replacing the damaged parts of the brain was found in the repositories of the Sector Bionica. They had been keeping it in storage all this time, withholding it from the laity — and for good reason, as it turns out. Isn't that right, Ferrenz?"

traits.locale_text: «¡Fue uno de los procedimientos más complejos que jamás he realizado! Sustituimos la mayor parte de los aumentos de su cabeza, pero solo pudimos encontrar un implante neural capaz de sustituir las partes dañadas del cerebro gracias al saber del sacerdocio de Marte. Lo habían guardado, evitando dárselo a los laicos... y, por lo que se ve, con razones de sobra, ¿verdad, Ferrenz?».

languages.text: 「今まで行った手術の中でも最も複雑な手術の1つでした！彼の頭部をほとんど交換しましたが、脳の損傷部分を補う神経インプラントは、セクター・ビオニカの倉庫で発見されたのですが、それは赤色の神職の知識のおかげです。彼らはそれをずっと保管していて、一般の人には渡していませんでした。そして、その理由は正当なものでした。そうでしょう、フェレンツ？」
languages.original_text: "It was one of the most complex procedures I have ever performed! We replaced the majority of his head augments, but it was only thanks to the knowledge of the crimson priesthood that a neural implant capable of replacing the damaged parts of the brain was found in the repositories of the Sector Bionica. They had been keeping it in storage all this time, withholding it from the laity — and for good reason, as it turns out. Isn't that right, Ferrenz?"

traits.locale_text: 「今まで行った手術の中でも最も複雑な手術の1つでした！彼の頭部をほとんど交換しましたが、脳の損傷部分を補う神経インプラントは、セクター・ビオニカの倉庫で発見されたのですが、それは赤色の神職の知識のおかげです。彼らはそれをずっと保管していて、一般の人には渡していませんでした。そして、その理由は正当なものでした。そうでしょう、フェレンツ？」

languages.text: "Yaptığım en karmaşık prosedürlerden biriydi! Baş ogmentlerinin çoğunu değiştirdik ama beynin hasarlı kısımlarını değiştirebilecek bir nöral implant ancak kızıl rahiplerin bilgi birikimi sayesinde Sektör Biyonika depolarında bulundu. Bunca zaman onu saklamışlar, halktan esirgemişler. Gerçi bunun iyi bir sebebi varmış, öyle değil mi Ferrenz?"
languages.original_text: "It was one of the most complex procedures I have ever performed! We replaced the majority of his head augments, but it was only thanks to the knowledge of the crimson priesthood that a neural implant capable of replacing the damaged parts of the brain was found in the repositories of the Sector Bionica. They had been keeping it in storage all this time, withholding it from the laity — and for good reason, as it turns out. Isn't that right, Ferrenz?"
